* openair_db unit-test fixture — small hand-built OpenAir set.
* Geometry is chosen so containment can be reasoned about exactly:
*  - box CTR:     52:14..52:23 N, 010:26..010:40 E, GND-2500
*  - circle RMZ:  centre 50:00:00 N 010:00:00 E, r 5 NM, GND-4500
*  - MUC TMA:     centre 48:00:00 N 011:00:00 E, r 30 NM, 1000-FL100
*  - MUC CTR:     centre 48:00:00 N 011:00:00 E, r 5 NM, GND-5000
*  - letter CTR:  AC D upgraded via name, box 47:00..47:10 N 008:00..008:10 E
*  - danger Q:    NOT indexed — must never match

* box CTR (DP polygon)
AC CTR
AN TEST CTR
AH 2500 MSL
AL GND
DP 52:23:00 N 010:26:00 E
DP 52:23:00 N 010:40:00 E
DP 52:14:00 N 010:40:00 E
DP 52:14:00 N 010:26:00 E

* circle RMZ
AC RMZ
AN TEST RMZ
AH 4500 MSL
AL GND
V X=50:00:00 N 010:00:00 E
DC 5.0

* large TMA (nested outer)
AC TMA
AN MUC TMA
AH FL100
AL 1000 MSL
V X=48:00:00 N 011:00:00 E
DC 30.0

* small CTR (nested inner, same centre)
AC CTR
AN MUC CTR
AH 5000 MSL
AL GND
V X=48:00:00 N 011:00:00 E
DC 5.0

* letter-class D upgraded to CTR via the name
AC D
AN LETTER CTR
AH 2500 MSL
AL GND
DP 47:10:00 N 008:00:00 E
DP 47:10:00 N 008:10:00 E
DP 47:00:00 N 008:10:00 E
DP 47:00:00 N 008:00:00 E

* danger area — parsed but never indexed
AC Q
AN TEST DANGER
AH FL100
AL GND
V X=45:00:00 N 009:00:00 E
DC 10.0
